name: @tootallnate/hca
description: Pure-JS decoder for CRI Middleware's High Compression Audio (HCA) codec — the compressed audio format used by many Japanese games and CRIWARE-licensed engines. Decodes a single HCA stream to interleaved Float32 / PCM16 samples ready to wrap in a WAV container or feed to the Web Audio API. Supports types 0 (none), 1 (static-permutation), and 56 (key-derived) ciphers.
author: Nathan Rajlich <n@n8.io>
